hooks.command: msg=$(jq -r '.message // "Input needed"'); loc=$([ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#S:#W' 2>/dev/null); notify-send -a "Claude Code" -u critical "Claude Code${loc:+ [$loc]}" "$msg" 2>/dev/null || true
loc=$([ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#S:#W' 2>/dev/null); notify-send -a "Claude Code" -u low "Claude Code${loc:+ [$loc]}" "Turn complete" 2>/dev/null || true
